test_type: Frontend + Backend - CR-015 FEFO Batch Stock Detail Panel (GAP-1 & GAP-2 fixes)
summary: Verified both GAP fixes in StockDetailPanel.jsx. GAP-1: Source store names now display real names (e.g., 'german fluid') instead of 'Store #807' via useRestaurantMap hook. GAP-2: Action buttons 'Dispatch' and 'Record Wastage' are wired with navigate() handlers. All 4 sections (Summary, Batch Inventory, Reconciliation, Consumption) load correctly.

tests.details: Component loads successfully at /inventory/{id} route. No console errors.
Login successful with credentials manager@germanfluid.com / Qplazm@10. Returns token and restaurant_id=806.

tests.feature: Navigate to Stock Inventory → click item → detail panel loads
tests.details: Navigated to /inventory, clicked on 'Baking Powder' item, detail panel loaded at /inventory/17635 with all 4 sections: Summary, Batch Inventory (5 batches), Reconciliation, Consumption History.
POST /api/proxy/auth/login returns 200 with token, restaurant_id=806, restaurant_name='german fluid'.
GET /api/ returns 200 with message 'Central Inventory API Proxy'.

tests.feature: GAP-1: Source store name shows real name (not 'Store #807')
tests.details: Batch table Source Store column displays 'german fluid' (real restaurant name) for all 5 batches. useRestaurantMap hook correctly resolves source_restaurant_id to restaurant name. Fallback 'Store #ID' would only show if restaurantMap lookup fails.

tests.feature: GAP-2: 'Dispatch' action button is clickable and navigates
tests.details: Clicked 'Dispatch' button on first batch row (BP-LOT-001 with 'Dispatch first' badge). Successfully navigated to /dispatch/new (Direct Dispatch page).

No expired batches exist in test data to click 'Record Wastage' button. Code review confirms onClick={() => onNavigate('/wastage/new')} is correctly wired at line 291. Button only appears when isExpired=true (days < 0).
Clicked 'Back to Inventory' button from detail page. Successfully navigated back to /inventory.

critical_code_review_comments: Line 595: restaurantMap destructured from useRestaurantMap() hook
Line 655: BatchInventorySection receives restaurantMap and onNavigate={navigate} props
Line 283: Store name resolution uses restaurantMap[String(seg.source_restaurant_id)]?.name with fallback to 'Store #ID'
Line 291-293: Record Wastage onClick={() => onNavigate('/wastage/new')} correctly wired
Line 296-298: Dispatch onClick={() => onNavigate('/dispatch/new')} correctly wired
Line 227-229: isExpired and isFirstExpiry logic correctly determines which action button to show

success_rate.frontend: 100% (7/7 features verified, 1 code-verified due to no test data)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing POS API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: CR-015 FEFO Batch Stock Detail Panel GAP fixes verified. GAP-1 (source store name) and GAP-2 (action button handlers) both working. Tested with Baking Powder (ID 17635) and Baking Soda (ID 17636) which have 5 batches each. No expired batches exist in current data, so 'Record Wastage' button couldn't be clicked but code is verified. 'Dispatch' button tested and navigates to /dispatch/new correctly.
